questions: What is the patient's gestational age in weeks?
Does the patient have signs of labour (uterine contractions, cervical change)? (Yes/No)
Are there any contraindications for tocolysis? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have poorly controlled diabetes or thyroid disease? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have sickle cell disease? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have cardiac disease? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have renal disease? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have myasthenia gravis? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have cardiac decompensation? (Yes/No)
Is there clinical or laboratory evidence of chorioamnionitis? (Yes/No)
